entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 11 from committed and pushed opportunity-trigger gate d37b201. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 11 produced 110 real schema-valid Planner responses and 110 passing opportunity-trigger reports covering 117 valid string triggers, so the Probe 10 malformed-trigger failure did not recur and the rejection branch was not exercised. Independent review moved the first unrecovered transition to action event 81: an oak log was removed but the expected drop was neither acquired nor collected while the action returned success. Event 152 repeated the missing acquisition with a 6000 ms pickup-navigation timeout. A later 60-second navigation deadline disconnected the bridge, 32 subsequent actions could not connect, the canonical terminal state failed closed, and evidence ended 0.015 seconds after the absolute deadline. No iron-source action occurred, BM-012 remains 0/3, and no second live episode ran in this round.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 12 from committed and pushed expected-drop postcondition gate 65fa34f. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 12 live-exercised five strict dig postconditions: three acquired the expected drop, two failed closed, zero false-positive successes occurred, and the first missing-pickup failure recovered through two subsequent successful digs. Independent review overrides two earlier movement-tolerance candidates and places the first unrecovered transition at event 169, where the collector reported inner pathfinder success while ending 2.092 blocks from the drop against a 1-block goal and inventory stayed at three dark-oak logs. A downstream 60-second move deadline disconnected the bridge, 39 later actions could not connect, and 147 observations were incomplete. The run passed 54/74 eligibility checks, acquired no iron, ended 0.031 seconds after the evidence boundary with zero post-deadline actions, leaves BM-012 at 0/3, and authorizes no second live episode before a new offline completion-grounding gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 13 from committed and pushed pickup-completion gate 05f0397. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 13 live-exercised the pickup-completion fallback: direct GoalNear resolution at 1.014 blocks was rejected, one standable GoalBlock fallback reached 0.876 blocks under the shared budget, and oak_log:+1 was observed. Independent review confirms event 974 as the next first unrecovered transition because target cell (103,136,-31) exactly matched the player's floored feet cell; the equipped crafting-table placement made no mutation and seven attempts timed out waiting for blockUpdate. The Agent completed seven autonomous goals, crafted a wooden pickaxe and torches, observed iron ore at distance 5, but acquired no iron. The run passed 54/74 eligibility checks, ended at the absolute deadline with no post-deadline Planner call, plan, or action, leaves BM-012 at 0/3 after thirteen attempts, and authorizes no second episode before a new offline player-occupancy gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 14 from committed and pushed player-occupancy gate a6e13c1. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 14 live-exercised m4-place-target-player-occupancy-v1: 21 same-reference player-collision attempts were rejected at zero duration with 21 replan calls, then adjacent reference (107,135,-29) placed the crafting table in 46 ms and the Probe 13 blockUpdate timeout did not recur. Independent review overrides the runner's earlier max-cycle candidate because that placement objective recovered at event 1554. The next first unrecovered transition is event 1724: ActionVerifier saw wooden_pickaxe:1 and accepted a stone dig, but the backend kept oak_planks in hand, removed the stone, produced no cobblestone entity or inventory delta, and repeated that irreversible no-drop failure seven times. The Agent selected seven autonomous goals, completed four, made 98 real schema-valid Planner calls, passed 54/74 eligibility checks, acquired no iron, and ended at the absolute deadline with no post-deadline Planner call, plan, or action. BM-012 remains 0/3 after fourteen attempts; no second episode is authorized before an offline required-tool equip gate passes and is pushed.

entries.retest_result: Probe 15 live-exercised m4-dig-required-tool-equip-v1: all 13 stone digs selected, equipped, and machine-confirmed wooden_pickaxe, 12 acquired cobblestone, and the isolated event-914 expected-drop failure recovered at event 936 before the goal completed at event 940. The Probe 14 held-item mismatch did not recur. The next first unrecovered transition is event 981: a deadline-bound coal move_to exhausted its 60-second action budget, correctly did not replay, but left bridge_reconnected=false with 281.859 seconds remaining. All 16 later actions failed, including 15 Not connected to bot bridge results. The Agent completed five of seven goals, made 81 real schema-valid Planner calls, passed 54/74 eligibility checks, acquired no iron, and ended 0.016 seconds after the absolute deadline without a post-deadline Planner call, plan, or action. BM-012 remains 0/3 after fifteen attempts; no second episode is authorized before a bounded offline no-replay bridge-recovery gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 16 from committed and pushed deadline-bound bridge-recovery gate a7b9d42. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 16 did not exercise m4-deadline-bound-bridge-recovery-v1: no deadline-bound action failed, no recovery event or disconnected-bridge action error occurred, all 10 move_to actions succeeded, and the terminal bot remained connected. The earliest causal blocker is action event 304 after event 283 had rejected reference (106,135,-29), supplied four adjacent candidates, and prohibited retry: real schema-valid replan events 292/294 repeated that exact reference and were rejected again with unchanged machine state. The rejected reference was attempted 20 times; the original 40-cycle root failed at event 1024, and adjacent reference (107,135,-29) succeeded only at event 1413 after 268.812 seconds of causal delay. The Agent completed 12 of 14 goals, made 101 real schema-valid Planner calls, passed 66/74 eligibility checks, acquired no iron, and emitted one Planner call plus one error plan 0.015 seconds after the absolute deadline without a post-deadline action. BM-012 remains 0/3 after sixteen attempts; no second episode is authorized before a bounded offline place-replan feedback-grounding gate passes and is pushed.

entries.retest_result: Probe 17 live-exercised m4-place-replan-feedback-grounding-v1 twice: event 311 failed closed on a repeated reference with zero task/action output, then event 354 selected supplied candidate (104,135,-31) and event 367 placed the crafting table. The runner's placement empty-plan candidate recovered. The earliest unrecovered transition is event 578 after recovery event 550 had confirmed fresh transport and machine player state following a 60000 ms move_to timeout: all 19 later navigation actions failed with Path was stopped before it could be completed and unchanged position, including a previously reachable control target, while craft, shelter, and wait commands still worked. The Agent completed 5 of 9 goals, passed 55/74 checks, acquired no iron, and ended 0.016 seconds after the absolute deadline with one in-flight wait result but no post-deadline Planner call or plan. BM-012 remains 0/3 after seventeen attempts; no code fix, second episode, or new live authorization exists before a bounded offline pathfinder-readiness gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 18 from committed and pushed pathfinder-readiness gate e78ccfc. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 18 did not exercise m4-deadline-bound-pathfinder-readiness-v1: no deadline-bound action failed, no bridge or navigation-recovery event occurred, and no PathStopped error recurred; 8/10 pre-critical moves succeeded and both bounded completion failures had later successful controls. The Runner's event-303 placement empty-plan recovered through event-379 placement and event-383 machine completion. The earliest unrecovered transition is event 817: an immediate-threat escape goal, real schema-valid plan, and ActionVerifier acceptance reached a move_to that ActionController rejected at zero duration solely because health was critical. Fourteen aligned survival actions were blocked, thirteen critical-health goals consumed the remaining goal slots, and the run ended with 244.437 seconds remaining. The Agent completed 7 of 24 goals, passed 67/74 checks, acquired no iron, remained connected and death-free, and stayed within the absolute deadline. BM-012 remains 0/3 after eighteen attempts; no code fix, second episode, or new live authorization exists before a bounded offline critical-health survival-action precondition gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 19 from committed and pushed critical-health survival-action gate 692cf77. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and are excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 19 did not exercise m4-critical-health-survival-action-precondition-v1: all complete observations held health and food at 20, no critical-health action or goal occurred, and no policy report was emitted. The Runner's event-424 coal empty-plan recovered through event-574 dig and event-577 machine verification. The earliest unrecovered transition is observation event 623 after action event 621 had machine-confirmed a crafting table at (106,136,-36): the table was absent from nearby machine state, task reconciliation did not close placement, and event 686 began fourteen zero-duration occupied-target repeats. Forty real schema-valid calls exhausted the torch root after 209.688 seconds. Moving adjacent later exposed the same table and event 1445 completed the machine objective, but the elapsed dusk budget did not recover. The Agent completed 10 of 15 goals, obtained coal, twelve cobblestone, and a stone pickaxe, then entered shelter preparation at world time 10039. Two shelter commands timed out and the final move crossed the deadline; Agent duration was 600.015 seconds, evidence duration 600.031 seconds, the result terminal snapshot failed closed, and 64/74 eligibility checks passed. BM-012 remains 0/3 after nineteen attempts; no code fix, second episode, or new live authorization exists before a bounded offline post-place crafting-table machine-observation gate passes and is pushed.

entries.patch_or_experiment_summary: Ran exactly one fresh BM-012 Probe 20 from committed and pushed post-place machine-observation gate 06957bd. No code, protocol, task contract, success threshold, world intervention, external step script, or second episode changed the live run. Raw JSONL and the local summary were used only for source cross-checking and remain excluded from version control.
entries.retest_result: Probe 20 live-activated m4-post-place-crafting-table-machine-observation-v1 twice: the first exact result closed the placement task and remained available to the next planner observation, nine failed place results were rejected, and Probe 19's same-target loop did not recur. Observer directly saw both successful tables, so omission projection remains offline-only. The Runner's event-820 torch empty-plan recovered through event-1083 placement, event-1116 stone-pickaxe craft, and event-1172 raw-iron acquisition. The earliest unrecovered transition is event 1193: plan event 1189 required raw_iron:2 and supplied a valid dig, but pre-plan GoalVerifier accepted the ready-task root from existing raw_iron:1 without a delta. Fourteen false completions then executed zero actions and exhausted all 24 goal slots with 190.516 seconds remaining. The Agent acquired one raw iron, remained connected and death-free, stayed inside the deadline, and passed 68/74 checks. BM-012 remains 0/3 after twenty attempts; no code fix, second episode, or new live authorization exists before a bounded offline ready-task GoalVerifier criteria-binding gate passes and is pushed.
